name: Cinco De Mayo Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mahatma Extra Long Grain Rice
1 lb Mild pork sausage or chorizo
2 cans Veg-All Mixed Vegetables, drained (15 oz)
1 small Head of cabbage, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare rice according to package directions using 2 cups chicken broth as the liquid.
3. While rice is cooking, brown sausage in a large skillet.
4. Add onions, garlic, and celery to the skillet. Continue to cook until vegetables are tender.
5. Add Veg-All, tomato paste, 1 cup chicken broth, cumin, chili powder, and cooked rice.
6. In a separate skillet, bring 1 cup of water to a boil. Add coarsely chopped cabbage and stir until wilted (about 1 minute).
7. Melt margarine in the bottom of a 9x11-inch baking dish.
8. Place half of the cabbage in the bottom of the baking dish.
9. Top with half of the rice/vegetable mixture.
10. Repeat steps 8-9 for the second layer.
11. Top with cheeses.
12. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
